target_0.brief_supporting_logic: The building within the green outline shows no visible structural damage, missing windows, or collapsed elements; all facade and window areas appear intact and undisturbed.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Visible evidence shows extensive structural failure with collapsed floors, exposed internal framing, and missing exterior walls across multiple upper levels; the lower section also exhibits severe collapse and debris; this constitutes 75 to 100 percent damage to the target building as a whole.

summary: Two buildings are assessed: one shows NO DAMAGE and the other is DESTROYED. The scene depicts a severely damaged multi-story building with extensive structural collapse and exposed interiors, contrasted with an intact building in the background. The destroyed building is likely functionally non-operational and poses a significant hazard.
